hypothesis: First-run bootstrap: build framework, run Phase 2 baselines, identify the honest performance ceiling with existing data.
what_i_did: Created quant_research/ directory. Identified 2 critical bugs: (1) MonthEnd(1) from non-month-end asof dates gives 1-2 day returns instead of full month; (2) regime gate was using NEXT month SPY state (look-ahead bias). Fixed both. Re-ran all experiments with correct date arithmetic. Ran 131 configs across 4 experiments (exp_001 through exp_004). Key IC analysis: GBM predictions (pred, pred_12m) have positive IC vs 1m return (IR 0.19-0.26); simple momentum features (d_sma50, rsi_14) have NEGATIVE IC vs correct 1m return. Built hold_engine with variable hold periods matching YLOka harness logic.

result.gate_status: NO config passes CAGR>=50% OR Sharpe>=2.0
result.gap_assessment: CAGR gate: need +10pp from 40%. Sharpe gate: need 2.25x from 0.89. Both require fundamentally better signal (IC 0.035 -> 0.10+) or leverage (not allowed).
critical_bugs_found: MonthEnd(1) date arithmetic error (wrong next-date for 27% of months)
Regime gate look-ahead: using next month SPY state
result.leakage_audit: PASSED: d_sma50 manually verified at 12 spot-check dates (0 mismatches). SPY regime uses current month-end only.

next_action: Priority 1: Build new GBM trained directly on 1m forward returns. Priority 2: Ridge regression with feature interactions.
